narrative:
Clark / Monroe / Tiverton (precinct in Coshocton County) has 853 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
